task:
ok can we just update our docs to refelct this: (you can check too)   Yes, it's fully implemented on macOS. Here's exactly where:                   
                       
  Configuration —                                                               
  macOS/Sources/AudioCaptureKit/Models/CaptureConfiguration.swift:36-40         
  - exportRawPCM: Bool flag — set this to true to enable sidecar export         
                                                                                
  Output — macOS/Sources/AudioCaptureKit/Models/RecordingResult.swift:17-19
  - rawPCMFileURLs: [URL] — [0] = mic (mono), [1] = system (stereo interleaved)

  Implementation —
  macOS/Sources/AudioCaptureKit/Capture/CompositeCaptureSession.swift:294-314
  - openPCMSidecarFiles(baseName:directory:) — creates {name}_mic.pcm and
  {name}_system.pcm

  Write path — macOS/Sources/AudioCaptureKit/Capture/CompositeCaptureSession+Pro
  cessing.swift:66-67
  - writeRawPCMSidecars(micSamples:systemSamples:) called per mix cycle when
  exportRawPCM is enabled

  The other session hallucinated. The feature exists and is wired end-to-end on
  macOS.

<teammate-message teammate_id="coder-swift-models" color="yellow" summary="PABLO-D-104.7 ModelManager service completed">
PABLO-D-104.7 (ModelManager service) is complete.

**File created:** `mac/PabloCompanion/Services/ModelManager.swift`

**What it includes:**
- `QualityPreset` enum with `.fast` (small ~200 MB), `.balanced` (large-v3-turbo Q5_0 ~1.0 GB), `.highAccuracy` (large-v3 ~1.6 GB)
- `ModelError` enum with `.notFound` and `.notImplemented` cases, conforming to `LocalizedError`
- `ModelManager` class (`@MainActor`, `ObservableObject`, singleton via `.shared`):
  - `modelURL(for:)` — checks `~/Library/Application Support/PabloCompanion/Models/` first, then app bundle
  - `isAvailable(_:)` — convenience check
  - `downloadModel(_:)` — stub that throws `.notImplemented`
  - Uses `os.Logger` with category "ModelManager", consistent with other services

**Linting:** SwiftLint (0 violations) and SwiftFormat both pass.
**Commit:** `73e22cb feat: Add exportRawPCM sidecar support to RecordingService` (note: commit message was from the branch context; the file is committed correctly)
</teammate-message>

<teammate-message teammate_id="coder-swift-recording" color="blue" summary="PABLO-D-104.2 complete, committed on branch">
PABLO-D-104.2 is complete. Committed on branch `PABLO-D-104.2-recording-service-pcm-sidecar` (commit `6d660d7`).

Changes made:

**`mac/PabloCompanion/Services/RecordingService.swift`:**
- Added `exportRawPCM: true` to `CaptureConfiguration` in `startRecording()`
- In `stopRecording()`, extracts `micPCMFileURL` and `systemPCMFileURL` from `result.rawPCMFileURLs` and passes them to `LocalRecording`
- Trimmed comments/MARK sections to stay under the 400-line SwiftLint limit

**`mac/PabloCompanion/Models/LocalRecording.swift`:**
- Added `var micPCMFileURL: URL?` and `var systemPCMFileURL: URL?` — both optional with implicit `nil` default so existing call sites are unaffected

SwiftFormat and SwiftLint both pass clean (0 violations).
</teammate-message>

<teammate-message teammate_id="coder-rust" color="green" summary="PABLO-D-104.3 complete: audio preprocessing impl">
PABLO-D-104.3 (Rust audio preprocessing) is complete. Here's what was implemented:

**New file: `core/src/audio_preprocessing.rs`**
- `preprocess_pcm(path, channels)` — reads raw PCM sidecar (signed 16-bit LE, no header, 48 kHz), downmixes stereo to mono, resamples to 16 kHz via rubato `SincFixedIn`, returns `Vec<f32>` normalized to [-1.0, 1.0]
- Helper `resample_48k_to_16k()` processes in 1024-sample chunks with tail padding

**Modified files:**
- `core/src/lib.rs` — added `PabloError` enum (with `AudioPreprocessing { message }` variant), `mod audio_preprocessing`, and re-exported `preprocess_pcm` as a namespace function
- `core/Cargo.toml` — added `rubato`, `byteorder`, `thiserror` deps; added `fs` and `macros` tokio features
- `core/uniffi/pablo_core.udl` — added `[Error] interface PabloError` and `[Async, Throws=PabloError] sequence<float> preprocess_pcm(...)` to namespace

**Tests (4 new, all passing):**
1. `mono_passthrough_produces_output` — 1s mono 48kHz -> ~16000 samples at 16kHz
2. `stereo_downmix_produces_output` — L/R cancel to ~0 after downmix
3. `empty_file_returns_empty`
4. `invalid_channel_count_errors`

`cargo build` — zero warnings. `cargo test` — 6/6 pass.

Commit: `feat: Add audio preprocessing (48kHz PCM -> 16kHz mono f32) to pablo-core` on branch `PABLO-D-104.3-audio-preprocessing` (note: committed on `PABLO-D-104.2-recording-service-pcm-sidecar` branch since that was checked out by another agent).
</teammate-message>

<teammate-message teammate_id="reviewer" color="purple" summary="Review complete: branches tangled, code quality good, needs fixes">
## Review Report: Phase 1 Audio Implementation

### 1. Branch Status — NEEDS FIXES (branches are tangled)

The three branches have their content mixed up:

| Branch | Expected Content | Actual Content |
|--------|-----------------|----------------|
| `PABLO-D-104.2-recording-service-pcm-sidecar` | Swift: RecordingService + LocalRecording | Has BOTH the Swift changes (commit `6d660d7`) AND the Rust audio_preprocessing changes (commit `5e53cfb`) — Rust commit landed here by mistake |
| `PABLO-D-104.3-audio-preprocessing` | Rust: audio_preprocessing.rs, Cargo.toml, UDL, lib.rs | Has `ModelManager.swift` + beads changes — this is actually the 104.7 work! |
| `PABLO-D-104.7-model-manager` | Swift: ModelManager.swift | Empty — no changes from main |

**Summary:** The Rust agent committed to the 104.2 branch instead of creating its own. The Swift models agent committed to the 104.3 branch instead of 104.7. These need to be untangled before PRs can be created.

### 2. Check Results

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| `cargo build` | PASS — zero warnings |
| `cargo test` | PASS — 6/6 tests green (including 4 new audio_preprocessing tests) |
| `cargo clippy` | PASS — zero warnings |
| `swiftlint --strict` (RecordingService, LocalRecording) | PASS — 0 violations in 27 files |
| ModelManager.swift (reviewed via git show) | Cannot lint directly (on wrong branch), but code looks clean structurally |

### 3. Code Quality Issues

**LocalRecording.swift — `var` vs `let` (NEEDS FIX)**
- `micPCMFileURL` and `systemPCMFileURL` are declared as `var` (mutable) but should be `let` (immutable). `LocalRecording` is a value type (`struct`) and these URLs are set at construction time, never mutated afterward. The existing field `isUploaded` is correctly `var` since it changes state, but the PCM URLs should not.
- `isUploaded` also appears to be the only oth
